reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: tsc --noEmit exited 0 with zero errors. Step 2: eslint . exited 0 with zero errors (after fixing two pre-existing any types in posts.ts).
gateVerdicts.rationale: Both verification commands are real, end-to-end checks. tsc type-checked the entire project. eslint linted every file. Neither used proxies.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Phase goal 'Confirm the codebase compiles and passes lint after all changes' is met. tsc and eslint both pass with zero errors.
gateVerdicts.rationale: The build and lint gates confirm the project is in a healthy state after all modifications across 5 phases.

gateVerdicts.evidence: No deferred work. The two pre-existing any types in posts.ts were proactively fixed during this phase so eslint would pass cleanly.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing left undone. Even discovered pre-existing lint errors were resolved so the project exits cleanly.
